test-code.description: Exhaustive Enum Switch - no default: ok
Exhaustive Enum Switch - with default: nok

expected-messages.message: The switch block is exhaustive even without the default case

test-code.description: Exhaustive Switch with sealed classes - without default: ok
Exhaustive Switch with sealed classes - with default: nok
ExhaustiveSwitchHasDefault issue with final fields not initialized in constructor #5670
But when the default is doing too much, we still get a violation

expected-messages.message: The switch block is exhaustive. The default case should only throw, nothing else.
